arts.ttl: Anthony Gordon responds to Liverpool transfer link with emphatic Newcastle message
arts.sum: Anthony Gordon has been heavily linked with a move to Liverpool in recent months and the 23-year-old Newcastle star has now spoken out about the transfer rumours

arts.ttl: Preview: Newcastle United vs. Leicester City - prediction, team news, lineups

arts.ttl: Newcastle United stars must do for Eddie Howe what he's done for them all season
arts.sum: I know how deeply Geordies love their club and what they will always do to help if they can but in my book it is the players who owe the supporters and not the other way round. However could the manager survive United being knocked out of the cup with the semi-final beckoning and suffering a further poor PL points return?

arts.ttl: Gordon: Who said I was leaving Newcastle? | 'Winning a trophy my priority'
arts.sum: Anthony Gordon says speculation about his future has affected his performances but insists he loves Newcastle United and is desperate to win a trophy with them.

arts.ttl: 'Who said I wanted to leave?' | Gordon on his future and Newcastle's inconsistency
arts.sum: Newcastle forward Anthony Gordon admits there are 'no excuses' not to fix their inconsistent form, and also reveals being distracted by talk over his future.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa and Newcastle target outshines Erling Haaland with 'monumental' Champions League heroics
arts.sum: He was imperious both in attack and defence...

arts.ttl: Agent of £55m Newcastle star rules out January move amid links back to old club
arts.sum: Newcastle could be set for a busy January transfer window as the Magpies look to add to their squad in order to make a push for the Premier League’s European places.
